title: cuscuta epithymum var. biloba
intro: Cuscuta epithymum var. biloba, also known as Dodder of the Epithyme or Bilobed Dodder, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Convolvulaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Cuscuta epithymum var. biloba are said to include improved cardiovascular health, enhanced immune function, and potential anti-aging effects. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and used as an infusion or decoction, or it is processed into capsules or tablets for convenient consumption.
